secure.description: Whether or not this view is secure

kind.description: Kind of the view, permanent (default) or temporary

recursive.description: Whether or not this view can refer to itself using recursive syntax withot requiring a CTE (common table expression)

comment.description: user comment associated to an object in the dictionary

query.description: Query used to create the view

created_on.description: Date and time when the view was created.

database_name.description: Database in which the view is stored

schema_name.description: Schema in which the view is stored

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the view
